name: ship
description: Feature pipeline for Codex Desktop worktrees: discover, plan, build, review, with only design and go gates.

interface.shortDescription: Idea to reviewed feature through a gated Codex flow.
interface.longDescription: Ship gives Codex a feature pipeline around Codex-managed worktrees: produce an HTML design spec, plan the whole feature, build it, verify it, open a review card, and land through a PR.
defaultPrompt: Ship this feature from idea to PR.
Run the ship flow for this UI change.
Design, build, and review this feature.
